intro: Centaurea belangeriana, also known as Belanger's knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and pain, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties.
